title: Config 11: adamw width=320 depth=2 batch=64 aug=affine
methodology: Generated a 2-hidden-layer MLP with width 320, batch size 64, adamw at lr=0.005, dropout=0.0, weight_decay=0.0001, augmentation=affine, and label_smoothing=0.02.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Tiny MNIST Classifier (tiny-mnist). Building on exp-002-baseline-2-layer-mlp with a focused hyperparameter/architecture change.
